sentences.translationEn: The grandmother kneads dough every morning.
She shapes the bread with her hands.

sentences.translation: Stavlja ga u pećnicu i čeka.
sentences.translationEn: She puts it in the oven and waits.

sentences.translation: Miris svježeg hljeba je jako lijep.
sentences.translationEn: The smell of fresh bread is very beautiful.
